description: A quick sleep diagnosis to help users understand what's happening to their body at night and recommend personalized sleep solutions.

headerContent.headline: It's Time That You Sleep Better
headerContent.subheadline: Hey, I'm Ashley — your virtual sleep guide. My job is simple: to help you wake up without the aches and pain, without the sleep fog, and without wondering why you're tired before the day even starts! If you're here, I'm guessing sleep hasn't been treating you right — and trust me, you're not alone.
headerContent.avatarIntroScript:
A lot of people struggle with restless nights, sore mornings, and that "why do I feel 20 years older stiffness". And while it feels mysterious, it usually isn't. 

There's always a reason — and there's almost always a solution. Let's run a quick sleep diagnosis — to figure out what's happening to your body at night.

answerOptions.label: Me and my partner
answerOptions.avatarResponse: What is your age? What is your partner's age?

questionContent.helperText: This helps me give you the best recommendation.

questionContent.questionText: Do you have trouble falling asleep?

answerOptions.label: Every night
answerOptions.avatarResponse: I'm sorry to hear that. Having trouble falling asleep every night leaves you with less overall sleep.

answerOptions.label: Frequently
answerOptions.avatarResponse: You aren't alone, many people are in the same situation and struggle with falling asleep fast.

answerOptions.label: On Occasion
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's completely normal and the group most people are in. Why not consider shooting for that perfect sleep where you feel rested each and every day.

answerOptions.label: Never
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's great to hear. You've got a great start on optimizing your sleep. It's more than just how fast you fall asleep but how supported you are throughout the night.

avatarContent.scriptText: From what you told me, it sounds like your biggest sleep disruptors are restless nights and not feeling fully rested. You'd be surprised how common those issues are — especially waking up sore, tossing and turning, or never quite feeling rested. And here's the twist most people miss: Many sleep problems start with an aging or unsupportive mattress. Our bodies change over the years — but our mattress usually doesn't! If it's been 7–10 years, or you wake up stiff and tired, your mattress is probably the culprit. Now imagine this instead — deep sleep that resets your whole body. You fall asleep faster. You stay asleep longer. You wake up thinking, 'Oh… so this is what rested feels like' - and without those aches and pains! Based on what you told me, these Tempur-Pedic mattresses are the best fit:

ctaContent.headline: Your Personalized Sleep Solutions
ctaContent.bodyText: Based on your sleep profile, I've selected Tempur-Pedic mattresses specifically designed to address YOUR needs. These recommendations have helped thousands of people wake up feeling truly rested.
